title: Remove payment gate from student sign-in and fix admin dropdown for sessions/materials

requirements.summary: Remove all payment gate and access code checks from the student sign-in flow so any student who logs in via Internet Identity can immediately access the student portal
acceptanceCriteria: A student who logs in via Internet Identity is never shown a 'payment pending' or 'access code required' error screen
Active students, pending students, and newly registered students can all log in and reach the student dashboard without interruption
The existing student registration flow and Internet Identity authentication mechanism remain unchanged

file_operations.description: Remove access code requirement and payment status checks from student login flow. After Internet Identity authentication succeeds, allow immediate navigation to /student/dashboard without validating payment status, approval status, or access code. Keep admin login flow unchanged.

Update the student route beforeLoad guard to remove any payment status or approval checks that block authenticated students from accessing the student portal. Only verify that the user has a valid Internet Identity authentication; do not check payment or approval status.

Remove any payment status validation or access code checks from the authentication helper functions. Ensure offline credential validation no longer blocks students based on payment or approval status.

requirements.summary: Display all registered students on the admin dashboard Students page with their payment and active status clearly shown for each student
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard Students page lists every registered student
Each student row shows their payment status (e.g., pending, paid/active) and active status badge
Students who have paid and are active are visually distinguished from pending students

file_operations.description: Update the students list to display all registered students fetched from the backend using listApprovals and getAllPayments queries. For each student row, show their payment status using the StatusBadge component (pending, approved, rejected) and display their active/pending state clearly. Ensure the table includes columns for student name, email, payment status badge, approval status badge, and action buttons. Use the backend interface methods listApprovals() and getAllPayments() to gather complete student data.

requirements.summary: Fix the student selector dropdown in admin ManageStudentSessions to populate with all enrolled/booked/active students so admin can select and add sessions for them
acceptanceCriteria: The student dropdown in ManageStudentSessions shows all enrolled/booked/active students
Admin can select a student from the dropdown and add a session for that specific student
Sessions added for a student are saved and visible under that student's record
No existing session structure or fields are changed

file_operations.description: Fix the student selector dropdown to query listApprovals() from the backend and filter for approved students (status === 'approved'). Populate the dropdown with all approved/enrolled students showing their name and email. When a student is selected, use their Principal from the UserApprovalInfo to pass to addSession mutation. Ensure the dropdown is never empty when approved students exist in the system.

Ensure the addSession mutation and getSessionsForStudent query properly handle Principal objects. Add helper functions if needed to convert between principal string representations and Principal objects for the dropdown selection flow.

requirements.summary: Fix the student selector dropdown in admin ManageStudentMaterials to populate with all enrolled/registered students so admin can select and add materials for them
acceptanceCriteria: The student dropdown in ManageStudentMaterials shows all enrolled/registered/active students
Admin can select a student from the dropdown and add materials for that specific student
Materials added for a student are saved and visible under that student's record
No existing materials structure or fields are changed

file_operations.description: Fix the student selector dropdown to query listApprovals() from the backend and filter for approved students (status === 'approved'). Populate the dropdown with all approved/enrolled students showing their name and email. When a student is selected, use their Principal from the UserApprovalInfo to pass to addMaterial mutation. Ensure the dropdown is never empty when approved students exist in the system.

Ensure the addMaterial mutation and getMaterialsForStudent query properly handle Principal objects. Add helper functions if needed to convert between principal string representations and Principal objects for the dropdown selection flow.
